name: hook-creator
description: Create, validate, and refine Claude Code plugin hooks for automating workflows. Use when building new hooks from scratch, validating existing hooks against best practices, or improving hook quality. Supports command hooks (shell scripts), prompt hooks (LLM decisions), event matching, decision schemas, and production safety validation. Claude auto-activates when you ask to build a hook, check hook reliability, improve hook configurations, or validate hooks for production.
